core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Corporate Consultancy with Modern SaaS aesthetics.
Content is King: Typography drives the hierarchy. No filler elements.
Negative Space: 2x standard spacing. Luxury = Space.
Contrast: High contrast text for readability. Sharp borders vs soft shadows.
anti_patterns: No purple or teal for CTAs.
No center-aligned text blocks longer than 3 lines.
No default Shadcn/Vercel look without customization.

typography.installation: Imports via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@300;400;600;700&family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@400;500;600&display=swap');

rules: Never center align main marketing copy unless it's a short 3-line statement.
Use asymmetric columns (e.g., col-span-7 vs col-span-5) for visual tension.
Add explicit padding to all bordered containers (p-6 or p-8).

buttons.primary: bg-[#ff6f28] hover:bg-[#e65a15] text-white rounded-lg px-8 py-6 font-semibold shadow-lg shadow-orange-500/20 transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-orange-500/30
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-[#2274df] hover:border-[#2274df]/30 rounded-lg px-8 py-6 font-medium transition-all

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-xl shadow-[0_2px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all duration-300 group relative overflow-hidden
cards.feature: Must use 'Tracing Beam' effect on hover (border color transition).
cards.hover_effect: On hover, reveal a 4px bottom border in brand gradient.

inputs.style: h-14 bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:border-[#ff6f28] focus:ring-[#ff6f28]/20 rounded-lg text-base

badges.style: bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px. Use brand gradient color for key icons.

hero.headline: Large, authoritative. Use 'Data Defense' and 'Data Offense' as key visual anchors.
hero.layout: Split screen. Text Left, Abstract Visual Right (masked or floating).
hero.cta: Primary Button: 'Get Strategy Assessment'. Secondary: 'View Case Studies'.

services.visuals: Use distinct iconography for each. Shield/Lock for Defense, Rocket/Chart for Offense.

lead_magnet.style: High value feel. Not a newsletter signup. A 'Professional Tool' download.
lead_magnet.background: Use the brand gradient as a subtle border or background with low opacity.

case_studies.grid: Use the Tetris Grid. Mix large highlight cards with smaller list items.
case_studies.content: Focus on metrics: '70% Performance Improvement', '3M+ Users'.

universal_rules_for_main_agent: DO NOT use generic AI emojis (🚀, 💡) in UI text. Use Lucide icons.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Do not use gradients for full backgrounds. Use them for borders, text, or small accents only.
Typography: Always use 'tracking-tight' for headings larger than 24px.
Interactive elements MUST have a visible focus state for accessibility.
